text:
On Fri, 23 Apr 2010 17:17:50 UT, Edwin Groothuis <edwin@freebsd.org> wrote:
> Maintainer of math/R,
>
> Please note that PR ports/145993 has just been submitted.

> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/145993

> --
> Edwin Groothuis via the GNATS Auto Assign Tool
> edwin@FreeBSD.org

This agrees with what i have, apart from a few patches that I'm not
sure I'm going to submit.  Please go ahead and commit it.

Regards,
